---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or an extension of an existing one.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What is the user / advisor / reviewer trying to do today that
     EduRAG doesn't help with? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- One or two paragraphs describing the change. Reference existing
     phase patterns where you can (e.g. "follows the Phase 11
     server-action + revalidatePath shape"). -->

## Why now

<!-- Why this matters today rather than later. Pin to a phase if
     possible (e.g. "blocks Phase 13 calibration work"). -->

## Honesty constraint considerations

<!-- Will this surface any projection / advisor / model output? If yes,
     describe how the honesty rules apply (CI ranges, observational
     caveats, banned-language filters). -->

## Out-of-scope

<!-- What this feature explicitly does NOT include — useful to keep
     the PR scoped. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Briefly. Helps reviewers understand why this shape and not another. -->
